text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, there are many shining lights in the
Umamusume world, no?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That said, I believe the most dazzling of those
lights belong to the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Do you agree?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And would you like to help that light grow?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Now then, let's go.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Bright, you're not alone today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember our promise? That we would
help the Mejiro family shine together?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Of course I do, Dober. That's why you're running
today too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah. For the Mejiros. And...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to bring the Mejiros into the future, before
you can!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ah... What a splendid desire. Let's be on our way,
then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Together, we'll see all the other glittering stars
outside of the Mejiro sphere.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This year's Arima Kinen has a spectacular lineup
of all-time high-class racers.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass, El, King, Sei! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Let's blow Bright and all our fans away with our
incredible speed!

text_block_list.name: Grass & El
text_block_list.text:
Right.
Sounds bueno to me!

text_block_list.name: King & Sky
text_block_list.text:
Of course!
All righty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Golden Generation. The young
up-and-comers making waves throughout the
racing world.

It's true that Umamusume can inherit strength,
but that ability is not reserved for members of
great racing families.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: As for me, I am my mother's daughter.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And here I will show you all the strength that I've
inherited from her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove, like the Mejiros, also hails from a
proud line of racers.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I saw it in the stars! A present has arrived for you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Bright, your present is me! I'm the cherry on the
sundae that is this race!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But I'm feeling lucky today, so I might just snap
up that victory instead. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru has a "luck" powerful enough
to overcome speed, lineage, and any other
factors that stand in her way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But who will emerge victorious after this
incredible race?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Regardless of the generation, the Mejiros have
always been the object of admiration.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That will never change, and I shall prove it. My
sisters of the past, please keep your eyes on me.
